queries.question: What are the broadsheets sold by Tesco and also the tabloids sold by Tesco?
queries.sql:
SELECT Broadsheet.Title
FROM Distributor JOIN Broadsheet ON Distributor.ID = Broadsheet.DistributorID
WHERE Distributor.Name = "Tesco"
UNION
SELECT Tabloid.Title
FROM Distributor JOIN Tabloid ON Distributor.ID = Tabloid.DistributorID
WHERE Distributor.Name = "Tesco"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?distributor a :Distributors .
    ?broadsheet a :Broadsheet .
    ?broadsheet p:hasDistributor ?distributor .
    ?broadsheet p:Title ?title .
    ?distributor p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Tesco")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?distributor a :Distributors .
    ?tabloid a :Tabloid .
    ?tabloid p:hasDistributor ?distributor .
    ?tabloid p:Title ?title .
    ?distributor p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Tesco")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show me broadsheets and tabloids sold by Tesco.
queries.sql:
SELECT Broadsheet.Title
FROM Distributor JOIN Broadsheet ON Distributor.ID = Broadsheet.DistributorID
UNION
SELECT Tabloid.Title
FROM Distributor JOIN Tabloid ON Distributor.ID = Tabloid.DistributorID
WHERE Distributor.Name = "Tesco"
